bonuses.leadin: An architect sought to blend the designs of a tower and podium for a building in this city. For 10 points each:
parts: Name this city where the Innovation Tower was built for its Polytechnic University. A distinctive I. M. Pei skyscraper in this city received criticism for the “X” shapes formed by its exterior of adjacent white triangles.
This architect, the “queen of the curve,” designed the Innovation Tower. The London Aquatics Center for the 2012 Olympics and Rome’s MAXXI museum were also designed by this British-Iraqi architect.

Hadid used two rocks being washed away by the Pearl River as the inspiration for a building of this type in Guangzhou. Sails inspired the iconic white roof of one of these buildings in Sydney designed by Jørn Utzon.
answers: Hong Kong (The Pei building is the Bank of China Tower.)
Zaha Hadid [or Dame Zaha Mohammad Hadid DBE RA]
opera house [or the Guangzhou Opera House; or the Sydney Opera House]
answers_sanitized: Hong Kong (The Pei building is the Bank of China Tower.)
